title: Request to add a black color option for items on Monday.com boards

posts.author: taliarosenberg (Talia Rosenberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to suggest adding black as an available color option when creating or editing items on Monday.com boards. Currently, there are multiple color selections available, but black is not included.

What are you trying to achieve

Adding a black option would provide greater flexibility for visual organization and categorization, particularly for users who rely on color-coding for priority levels, confidential items, administrative tasks, or neutral labeling. Black is a standard color used in many project management systems and would enhance customization and consistency across boards.
